description_long: This is a sleek, two-door sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a convertible roof. The body is painted in a distinctive pink color, with a black windshield and dark-tinted windows. The front features a wide grille, aggressive air intakes, and sculpted hood vents, while the rear is streamlined with subtle taillights and no visible spoiler. The wheels are large, with a multi-spoke design, and the tires are low-profile, emphasizing performance. The interior appears to have two bucket seats and a minimalist dashboard, typical of high-end sports cars. The overall design suggests speed, luxury, and urban sophistication.
description: A pink convertible sports car with a low, aerodynamic body, black-tinted windows, and multi-spoke wheels. It features a sculpted hood, wide grille, and a sleek, performance-oriented design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, sculpted hood vents, and black windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the convertible roof, two bucket seats, and multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the streamlined back, subtle taillights, and absence of a spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view with clear visibility of the interior, wheels, and aerodynamic body lines.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke alloy wheels with a dark finish
